title: T9 Voice: audio-out engine decision + build
prompt: Close the audio-out open decision (docs/human-comms.md) and ship the ONE spoken-output pathway for factory events. The decision is pre-made in the war game — kokoro-tts primary (David's local/free skill at appydave-plugins/appydave/skills/kokoro-tts, one-time setup.sh install sanctioned), macOS say as guaranteed fallback, ElevenLabs rejected for ambient events (metered, network-bound, key lives in fligen, and the elevenlabs-agents skill human-comms.md cites does not exist on this machine) — your job is to measure, build, wire, and record it, not re-litigate it. Build engine/speak.py (stdlib-only: MUTE flag at engine/store/MUTE, .speak.lock serialization, kokoro-to-say auto-fallback, speak.log ledger, exit 0 in every path, never calls claude), wire it fire-and-forget (Popen, start_new_session=True) into BOTH notify() seams (engine/orchestrator.py ~162, engine/wake.py ~59, duplicate-don't-import), prove the chain live with a dummy done-ticket through the launchd wire (removed after), and write the decision record docs/audio-out.md (measured latencies, wire diagram, MUTE ops, re-open triggers) plus line-level annotations to docs/human-comms.md and docs/comms-flow.md. Read and execute the war game at backlog/wargames/T9-01-audio-out-engine.md. Follow its moves in order; on any failure signal apply the counter-move; on any abort condition stop and write needs-decision/.
verify: engine/speak.py exists; 'python3 engine/speak.py "verification pass" --engine say' exits 0 and engine/store/speak.log gains a [spoken engine=say] line; with engine/store/MUTE touched the same call logs [muted] and speaks nothing (MUTE removed afterwards); no leftover engine/store/.speak.lock. grep -c 'speak.py' returns >=1 in BOTH engine/wake.py and engine/orchestrator.py, and an import-call of each file's notify() produces a speak.log line within ~15s. A dummy done-ticket drop produced paired wake.log [return] + speak.log [spoken] lines via launchd (or a hand-run of wake.py if Recon 8 found launchd unloaded, or import-call bar under Fork F2 Route B — stated in result notes), with the dummy removed and .done-state.json re-baselined. docs/audio-out.md exists naming the kokoro/say/ElevenLabs ruling with measured numbers and re-open triggers; docs/human-comms.md and docs/comms-flow.md carry the line-level annotations pointing at it. Negative: engine/consumer.py untouched; no ElevenLabs key added to dark-factory/.env and the API never called; appydave-plugins repo has zero modifications; speak.py never invokes claude; done/ holds zero DUMMY files; MUTE and WAKE-ARMED not left behind. Committed and pushed on dark-factory main.
